narrative:
Ottawa County has 29,639 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 37.0% of registrants.
